name: logo-platform
description: AI Logo Design Platform — modernist design principles engine

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @logo-platform/api" "wait-on http://localhost:3001/api/health -t 60000 && npm run dev -w @logo-platform/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @logo-platform/shared && npm run build -w @logo-platform/knowledge-base && npm run build -w @logo-platform/prompt-engine && npm run build -w @logo-platform/ai-engines && npm run build -w @logo-platform/image-generator && npm run build -w @logo-platform/api && npm run build -w @logo-platform/web
